/CAL:MTN FOR REMOVAL OF BAIL/X:VICTIM'S FATHER ADDRESSES THE COURT,/MO PC1385:INSUFFICIENT EVIDENCE/BE/SATERM/VD:PRE-TRIAL DATE OF 05-02-13 IN DEPT 23/VD:TRIAL DATE OF 05-17-13/
/CAL:MOTION FOR REMOVAL OF BAIL CONDITIONS/CTORD:THIS MATTER IS TRANSFERRED FORTHWITH TO DEPT 24 FOR HEARINGON THE MOTION BEFORE JUDGE FOLEY/X:JUDGEMCCABE RECUSES HERSELF FROM THIS MATTER/

/CAL:BIFURCATED PRELIMINARY HEARING/X: TESTIMONY OF DAVID TINT RESUMES,/WIT SWORN DA: INSPECTOR JOSEPH CLEMONS/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT #1: 3-PAGE DOCUMENT OF DR, DAVID PORTIER/EXHM:DEFENDANT'S EXHIBIT A: 2-PAGE CHRONOLOGICAL REPORT/ARG&SUB/HTA1:1 & 2/X: ALLEGATION PURSUANT TO PC 12022,7(A) FOUND TO BE TRUE,/X: DEFENSE ORAL MOTION TO REDUCE OFFENSES TO MISDEMEANOR PURSUSANT TO PC 17(B) IS DENIED,/CTORD:BAIL REDUCED WITH THE FOLLOWING CONDITIONS:/X: 1) DEFENDANT SHALL COMPLETE FOP AND ADDITIONAL ALCOHOL COUNSELING CLASSES AS DIRECTED BY THE COURT;/X: 2) DEFENDANT SHALL BE ON SCRAM ELECTRONIC MONITORING; AND/X: 3) DEFENDANT SHALL STAY AWAY FROM STEVEN LIBERMAN, CHELSEA JAVIER AND DAVID TINT,/SAORD2/BAIL:50,000/DEFTCUST3/SHERCOM1//X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED/X:TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT/DOP/
